title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at State Bank of India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at State Bank of India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with State Bank of India! We are hiring a Risk Analyst for our Vijayawada team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About State Bank of India:
State Bank of India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in SAP FICO

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with State Bank of India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
